|timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="EpIAdv">The first four installments of the ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' series form a continuous story that is set prior to the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] possesses the [[Scimitar/Legends|''Scimitar'']] during the series, and ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates both his acquisition of the ship and the events of ''The Phantom Menance'' to 32 BBY, thus placing the events of the first four ''Episode I Adventures'' books in 32 BBY as well.</ref>
|series=''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]''

|followed by=[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children|''The Ghostling Children'']]
}}
'''''Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency''''' was the fourth installment of ''[[Star Wars]] [[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures|Episode I Adventures]]''.

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''A young girl has been found who has the power to become a Jedi''.

''But an evil scientist doesn't want to let her go. And her home is under attack by Bartokk Assassins.''

''Yoda, Mace Windu, and the other Jedi must save her.''

''The future is at stake.''
